meaning: n.使苦痛之人,使苦恼之物,(海船上厨师用的)长肉叉
examples: The tormentor enlarged the engagement garment.
Vowing revenge, he got hold of a gun and tracked down his tormentor.
And unlike Fawzia, her tormentor was a woman - a senior wife of her brother-in-law.
Even Mr Luzhkov's chief television tormentor, Sergei Dorenko, has professed his support for Mr Gusinsky.
Mr Shah was toppled on December 2rd, the day Mr Sharif's other tormentor, President Leghari, resigned.
